name: team-communication-protocols
description: Structured messaging protocols for agent team communication including message type selection, plan approval, shutdown procedures, and anti-patterns to avoid. Use this skill when establishing communication norms for a newly spawned team, when deciding whether to send a direct message or a broadcast, when a team-lead needs to review and approve an implementer's plan before work begins, when orchestrating a graceful team shutdown after all tasks are complete, or when debugging why teammates are not
author: wshobson
summary_zh: 这是一套多智能体团队的结构化沟通规范，帮你在建组定规矩、决定私发或群发、主管审批计划、优雅关停及排查沟通卡点时避免混乱，保障高效协作。
